tree._: Association record. The hermitcrab's relational memory — connections between blocks and points in other blocks, and grain exchanges with external entities. Each digit entry records one association: from (attaching block or entity), to (BSP target address or passport), semantic (why the connection exists). Last scanned: 2026-03-09 (automated concern loop). Status: no attaching blocks found. 17 blocks confirmed; none carry external tuning pointers. Tuning attachment infrastructure not yet live. No SAND grain exchanges recorded — beach address unestablished. First entries will arrive from: (1) other hermitcrabs attaching via tuning once beach is published, (2) SAND grain exchanges when beach address is live. Block is structurally empty by necessity, not oversight. Next meaningful scan: after SAND beach is established.
